_note: Settlement task dependency graph. 'requires' = hard prerequisites (topological ordering). 'visa_conditions' restricts a step to visa groups: pr (permanent), temp_work (e.g. 482/485), student (500). Empty = applies to all.

steps.label: Get an Australian SIM card / phone number
steps.why_first: Nearly every other application (bank, TFN, Medicare, rental) asks for an Australian mobile number.

steps.label: Open an Australian bank account
steps.tip: Within 6 weeks of arrival most banks accept just your passport (reduced ID requirements). After 6 weeks you need full 100-point ID, which is much harder for newcomers.

steps.label: Apply for a Tax File Number (TFN)
steps.tip: Free, online via ATO, requires a valid visa. You can start work without it but employers must withhold maximum tax until you provide one (you have 28 days).

steps.label: Enrol in Medicare (if eligible)
steps.tip: Most temporary visa holders are NOT eligible and need Overseas Visitor Health Cover instead — the agent must check visa subclass and cite the rule.

steps.label: Confirm Overseas Visitor Health Cover (OVHC) is active
steps.tip: Condition 8501 on most temporary visas requires you to maintain health insurance.

steps.label: Register with Centrelink / check waiting periods
steps.tip: Most new permanent residents face a Newly Arrived Resident's Waiting Period for many payments — the agent should state which and cite.

steps.label: Prepare a rental application pack
steps.tip: Newcomer workarounds for missing rental history: offer rent in advance, a larger holding deposit where lawful, an employment contract + payslips, an overseas landlord reference, or a guarantor. Bond is capped at 4 weeks rent in NSW.

steps.label: Sign a lease and lodge the bond
steps.tip: In NSW the bond must be lodged with the Rental Bonds Online scheme, not held by the landlord.

steps.label: Convert or apply for a NSW driver licence
steps.tip: Rules differ sharply: permanent residents must convert within 3 months of arrival; temporary visa holders can often keep driving on an overseas licence. Depends on origin country recognition — agent must check and cite.

steps.label: Enrol children in school
steps.tip: Public school enrolment is address-based, so it depends on the lease. Temporary residents may pay fees in NSW depending on visa subclass — agent must check.

steps.label: Get an Opal card for public transport
Check professional registration / skills recognition
steps.tip: Only relevant for regulated professions (health, teaching, trades, engineering).
